title: Creative Computing BSc (Hons) | University of Southampton Delhi
text: Creative Computing BSc (Hons). Award: BSc (Hons). Duration: 3 years. Course Type: Full Time. Start Date: August 2026. The programme combines technology, creativity, design, and digital innovation. Students develop industry-ready programming skills while specialising in user experience design, physical fabrication, or project management. The curriculum focuses on creating immersive and engaging digital experiences by bringing together art and technology. Students gain extensive experience in team-based production and computational projects. The programme develops creative, technical, and intellectual strengths using industry-standard technologies while considering philosophical and ethical approaches. The degree is taught in English and is equivalent to the University of Southampton UK programme. The University is mandated by the UGC to deliver equivalent programme quality as offered in the United Kingdom.
summary: A three-year full-time undergraduate degree that combines computing, design, creativity, and digital innovation. Students develop programming skills alongside expertise in user experience design, fabrication, or project management while working on collaborative technology-driven projects.
